chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-252 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution due to non-compliance of office objection i.e. to provide duplicate set of main petition. 20.04.2022 No one was present on the last date of hearing and so also today. There is no intimation either. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
